title: Monte Carlo Simulation: What is the primary goal of using Monte Carlo simulations...
summary: Explain how Monte Carlo simulations model potential outcomes under uncertainty.
prompt: What is the primary goal of using Monte Carlo simulations in risk analysis?

options.text: Monte Carlo simulations are utilized to model a range of potential outcomes by

solution: Monte Carlo simulations are utilized to model a range of potential outcomes by incorporating randomness and variability in inputs, allowing for a better understanding of the risks involved.
